title: rinorea scheffleri
intro: Rinorea scheffleri, also known as the Scheffer's violet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. It is a tropical plant native to Africa, valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever and inflammation. The plant's leaves and roots have been used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms of malaria, fever, and rheumatism, and are believed to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Rinorea scheffleri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, allowing for various applications in the treatment of various health conditions.
